mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (user_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
